polishOriginalHint: After editing the original, polish again before sending
guidanceLabel: Guidance (hidden, appended at end of prompt)
systemPrefixDesc: Hidden system message prefix injected before the guidance text for guided send / regenerate.
injectionOrderSendDesc: Post-user merge order (lower = closer to user). Default 0.
injectionOrderReviseAssistantDesc: Assistant draft slot for guided revise. Default 0.
injectionOrderReviseSystemDesc: Guidance system slot for guided revise. Default 1.
reviseSystemPrefixDesc: Hidden system prefix for revise mode, placed after the current assistant reply and before the guidance text.
polishSystemPrefixDesc: System instruction for polishing the visible user input in the guided-send dialog, with recent history. Output the polished user message only.
polishHistoryTurnsDesc: How many recent conversation turns to attach via transcript.tail when polishing (0–40, default 8).
